title: Family Counseling Master's Program Application and Fees
content:
Family Counseling Master's Program Application and Fees

Applications for 2025-2026 Fall Semester will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Sunday

Online Pre-registration form link is given below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

THERE WILL NOT BE A SCIENCE EXAM FOR FAMILY COUNSELING MASTER’S DEGREE PROGRAM FOR 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER.

Candidates should have taken ALES exam with a minimum of 55 Equal Weight Score to be eligible for application.

In Family Counseling Master’s degree program with thesis 65% of ALES Score and 35% of undergraduate grade point average is used for evaluation.

-In Family Counseling Master’s degree without thesis 50% of undergraduate grade point average and 50% of ALES Score is used for evaluation.

-In case an applicant for the non thesis program does not have an ALES Score, ALES Score of 55 is used for the ranking purposes.

– Original  and a copy of the undergraduate diploma

– Original and a copy of the undergraduate transcript (transcript)

– ALES exam result document (for Thesis Program)

– Copy of identity card

– Four Photos

Special Conditions for Candidates:

Candidates who will apply to study in this master's degree program;

1. Applicants should have a four-year undergraduate degree in psychology, psychological counseling and guidance, sociology, nursing, social work, medicine and child development

2. ALES exam result document with a minimum of Equal Weight Score of 55 points
